## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeFatIngredient class

A resolved view of a fat ingredient with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeFatIngredient extends RuntimeIngredientBase implements IRuntimeFatIngredient 
```
**Extends:** [RuntimeIngredientBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimeingredientbase.md)

**Implements:** [IRuntimeFatIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimefatingredient.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeFatIngredient` class.
